title: quetzalia ilicina
intro: Quetzalia ilicina, also known as Illicium, is a plant species belonging to the magnolia family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible seeds. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Quetzalia ilicina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often used to make tea, while the bark and roots are used to make infusions and decoctions, which are consumed to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
